SpecialStructure.Name: UNSC_FARM
SpecialStructure.LandBehavior: SPACE_OBSTACLE, LAND_OBSTACLE, REVEAL, HIDE_WHEN_FOGGED, DAMAGE_TRACKING, DUMMY_LAND_BASE_LEVEL_COMPONENT, UNIT_AI, EARTHQUAKE_TARGET, TERRAIN_TEXTURE_MODIFICATION,ION_STUN_EFFECT, STUNNABLE
